summary.en: USD liquidity remains in a neutral-tight state. The Fed balance sheet is expanding slightly, but RRP has effectively hit zero, eliminating the liquidity buffer. A single-day TGA surge of $145B on tax day creates significant short-term headwinds.
summary.zh: 美元流动性维持中性偏紧缩状态。美联储资产负债表小幅扩张，但 RRP 已实际归零，流动性缓冲消失。税日单日 TGA 暴增 1450 亿美元，短期流动性逆风显著。

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — liquidity buffer fully depleted
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——流动性缓冲已完全耗尽

tga_note.en: Single-day surge of $145B on tax day, draining bank reserves
tga_note.zh: 税日单日暴增 1450 亿美元，直接抽取银行准备金

net_liquidity_change.zh: 持平（TGA 暴增抵消美联储扩表）

details.en: RRP has effectively reached zero, eliminating its role as a liquidity buffer. On tax day, TGA surged by $145B in a single session, directly draining bank reserves. Bank reserves currently stand at $3.06T and face further compression risk. The Fed's T-bill purchases provide a medium-term positive signal, but the near-term liquidity environment remains constrained. The system's tolerance for liquidity shocks has fallen sharply.
details.zh: RRP 已实际归零，其流动性缓冲功能完全消失。税日当天 TGA 单日暴增 1450 亿美元，直接从银行准备金中抽取资金。银行准备金目前为 3.06 万亿美元，面临进一步压缩风险。美联储购买 T-bills 提供了中期正面信号，但近期流动性环境仍受约束。系统对流动性冲击的容忍度已大幅下降。

reason.en: Fed balance sheet expanding (+$20B WoW) is positive, but RRP hitting zero removes the liquidity buffer entirely. TGA tax-day surge of $145B directly drains bank reserves. Net effect: neutral at best, with elevated short-term risk.
reason.zh: 美联储资产负债表扩张（周环比 +200 亿美元）是正面信号，但 RRP 归零彻底消除了流动性缓冲。税日 TGA 单日暴增 1450 亿美元直接抽取银行准备金。净效果：充其量中性，短期风险上升。

reason.en: Q1 earnings growth estimated at 12.6%, with 80% beat rate. However, 9 out of 11 sectors have seen EPS downward revisions. Forward P/E at 20.4x is stretched relative to historical norms. Earnings quality is mixed — headline beats, but underlying revisions are cautionary.
reason.zh: Q1 盈利增长预估 12.6%，超预期率 80%。但 11 个板块中有 9 个出现 EPS 下修。前瞻市盈率 20.4 倍相对历史水平偏高。盈利质量参差不齐——表面超预期，但内在修正方向令人警惕。

reason.en: 54.87% of S&P 500 stocks are above their 200-day MA — barely above the 50% threshold. Top 10 concentration at 35.59% is historically elevated. The rally remains narrow and structurally fragile, with breadth failing to confirm index-level strength.
reason.zh: 标普 500 中 54.87% 的股票位于 200 日均线上方——仅勉强超过 50% 的临界线。前 10 大股票集中度达 35.59%，处于历史高位。行情依然集中，结构脆弱，广度未能确认指数层面的强势。

reason.en: Goldman Sachs beat earnings expectations but the stock sold off — a classic 'beat-and-sell' divergence. Mag7 stocks showing bearish technical divergence. This is the 6-month bad-news early warning signal. Price action is no longer confirming the earnings narrative.
reason.zh: 高盛盈利超预期但股价下跌——典型的「盈利超预期却被抛售」背离。Mag7 部分个股出现技术性看跌背离。这是 6 个月坏消息的早期预警信号。价格行为不再印证盈利叙事。

trading_summary.en:
51.9 — direction unclear. Liquidity hasn't confirmed expansion, breadth barely passing, price signals show divergence. Not a fat pitch. Time to wait.

Holding 30-40% cash isn't cowardice, it's discipline. Wait for TGA to digest, liquidity to confirm, breadth to expand above 60%. The GS beat-and-sell is the loudest signal today — when a market leader beats and gets sold, the market is telling you something. Don't fight the tape.
trading_summary.zh:
51.9分，方向不清晰。流动性没确认扩张，广度勉强及格，价格信号有背离。不是 fat pitch，是等待的时候。

持有 30-40% 现金不是懦弱，是纪律。等 TGA 消化，等流动性确认，等广度扩展到 60%+ 再说。高盛的「超预期被抛售」是今天最响亮的信号——当市场领头羊超预期却被卖出，市场在告诉你一些事情。不要逆势而为。

trading_quote: It's not about being right, it's about how much you make when you're right and how much you lose when you're wrong.

note.zh: 小幅上涨，广度依然不足
维持高位，关注通胀数据
收益率曲线 +53.1 bps，小幅陡化
美元持续偏弱，多周低位

note.en: Slight pullback from highs, safe-haven bid intact
note.zh: 从高位小幅回落，避险需求仍在
小幅回落，地缘政治溢价仍存
在 $75K 阻力位附近盘整

analysis.en: BTC continues to consolidate near the $75,000 resistance zone. The 52-week range of $60,074–$126,198 shows significant upside potential if macro conditions improve. Fear & Greed at 55 (Neutral-Greed) suggests the market is not overheated. Exchange net outflows remain a bullish structural signal. Key watch: a decisive close above $76,500 would signal a breakout attempt.
analysis.zh: BTC 继续在 $75,000 阻力区附近盘整。52 周区间 $60,074–$126,198 显示若宏观条件改善仍有较大上行空间。恐惧贪婪指数 55（中性偏贪婪）表明市场未过热。交易所净流出持续，是看涨的结构性信号。关键观察点：若能有效收盘于 $76,500 上方，将发出突破信号。

gold_silver_note.zh: 偏高——白银表现落后，历史上会均值回归

key_driver_detail.zh: 央行购金 + 美元走弱

analysis.en: Gold pulls back slightly from recent highs but the structural bull case remains intact. Dollar weakness (DXY at 98.21) is providing a tailwind. Central bank buying from China, India, and Turkey continues. The gold/silver ratio at 88.3 remains historically stretched — silver may outperform in a catch-up move. Real yield headwinds are partially offset by safe-haven demand.
analysis.zh: 黄金从近期高位小幅回落，但结构性牛市逻辑依然完整。美元走弱（DXY 98.21）提供顺风支撑。中国、印度、土耳其央行持续购金。金银比 88.3 仍处历史高位——白银可能在追赶行情中表现更优。实际收益率的逆风被避险需求部分抵消。

title.en: RRP Buffer Gone — Zero Shock Tolerance
title.zh: RRP 缓冲归零——系统抗冲击能力大幅下降

description.en: With RRP effectively at zero, the financial system has lost its primary liquidity buffer. Any unexpected shock — a failed Treasury auction, a credit event, or sudden risk-off — will hit bank reserves directly with no cushion. The system is operating with minimal margin of safety.
description.zh: RRP 实际归零后，金融系统失去了主要流动性缓冲。任何意外冲击——国债拍卖失败、信用事件或突然的风险规避——都将直接冲击银行准备金，毫无缓冲。系统正在以极小的安全边际运行。

title.zh: TGA 税季抽水——$3000 亿以上风险

description.en: TGA surged $145B in a single day on tax day. Total tax-season drain could exceed $300B, directly compressing bank reserves from the current $3.06T. This mechanical liquidity withdrawal could trigger volatility in short-term funding markets and spill over into risk assets.
description.zh: 税日当天 TGA 单日暴增 1450 亿美元。整个税季的抽水总量可能超过 3000 亿美元，直接压缩目前 3.06 万亿美元的银行准备金。这种机械性流动性撤出可能引发短期融资市场波动，并蔓延至风险资产。

title.zh: 价格背离——盈利超预期被抛售预警

description.en: Goldman Sachs beat earnings expectations but saw its stock sold off — a classic early warning signal. Mag7 stocks are showing bearish technical divergence. Historically, when market leaders begin to sell off on good news, it signals that the market is pricing in future deterioration 6 months ahead.
description.zh: 高盛盈利超预期但股价遭到抛售——这是典型的早期预警信号。Mag7 部分个股出现技术性看跌背离。历史上，当市场领头羊开始在好消息上被卖出，意味着市场正在提前 6 个月定价未来的恶化。

status.zh: 活跃——盈利超预期被抛售

description.en: Goldman Sachs (GS) reported Q1 earnings that beat consensus expectations, yet the stock sold off on the news. Additionally, several Mag7 components are showing bearish technical divergence on their price charts. This 'beat-and-sell' pattern is a 6-month early warning signal — it suggests the market is beginning to price in future deterioration even as current results look strong. Monitor closely as more mega-cap tech earnings are released.
description.zh: 高盛（GS）公布的 Q1 盈利超出共识预期，但股价在消息发布后遭到抛售。此外，Mag7 中部分个股在价格图表上出现技术性看跌背离。这种「盈利超预期被抛售」的模式是 6 个月的早期预警信号——它表明即使当前业绩亮眼，市场已开始提前定价未来的恶化。随着更多科技巨头财报发布，需密切监控。

disclaimer.en: Data sources: Yahoo Finance / FRED / U.S. Treasury / MacroMicro. For research purposes only, not investment advice.
disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / 美国财政部 / MacroMicro。仅供研究，非投资建议。
